verses.text: As Babylon besieges the city, Zedekiah sends to ask Jeremiah whether God will work a wonder to deliver them. He seeks God too late. Men often turn to the prophet only when the crisis is upon them.
As Babylon besieges the city, Zedekiah sends to ask Jeremiah whether God will work a wonder to deliver them. He seeks God too late. Men often turn to the prophet only when the crisis is upon them.

God answers that He Himself will fight against them and turn their weapons back; Zedekiah will fall into Babylon's hand. God is now their adversary. When a people persist in sin, the LORD opposes the very arms they trusted.

God answers that He Himself will fight against them and turn their weapons back; Zedekiah will fall into Babylon's hand. God is now their adversary. When a people persist in sin, the LORD opposes the very arms they trusted.

God sets before them 'the way of life, and the way of death'; whoever surrenders to the Chaldeans shall live. Submission is the path of life. Even in judgment, God leaves a door of mercy for those who will take it.

God sets before them 'the way of life, and the way of death'; whoever surrenders to the Chaldeans shall live. Submission is the path of life. Even in judgment, God leaves a door of mercy for those who will take it.

He charges the house of David to 'execute judgment in the morning,' for He is against the proud who say, Who shall come against us? Justice was their duty. God opposes the leaders who trusted their defences instead of doing right.
